mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua无法模拟HTML5拖拽事件。找到了带isDragActive视觉反馈的styled dropzone，多次尝试left_click_drag拖拽文本到dropzone，但dropzone边框始终未变为蓝色(#2196f3)，left_click_drag执行的是文本选择拖拽而非HTML5 drag-and-drop事件，无法触发dragenter从而验证isDragActive状态。此外bug需Firefox验证，mano-cua使用Chrome
mano_cua.last_reasoning: dropzone border still same gray dashed border, did NOT change to blue (#2196f3). left_click_drag performs text selection drag, NOT HTML5 drag event. React Dropzone listens for dragenter events which are NOT fired during text selection drags.
